scenarios.narrative: Labetalol on manufacturer backorder until 2026-05-18. Nifedipine ER and methyldopa are stocked alternatives — both first-line for postpartum hypertension per ACOG.

nifedipine ER 30mg.pa_reason: Plan formulary requires labetalol trial first

scenarios.narrative: Labetalol available without PA. Nifedipine ER requires prior auth (formulary step therapy). Recommend labetalol as first line.

delivery_window.reason: Same-day courier slot — only afternoon window available

scenarios.narrative: Stock available, but same-day delivery is restricted to a 4–8 PM window.
